C. Detection of CEs from in vivo samples

quick_bind = master_table %>% 
    select(gene,paste_into_igv_junction,junc_cat,tdp43_sensitivity_sh,tdp43_sensitivity_be2) %>% 
    mutate(gene = glue::glue("{gene}_{junc_cat}")) %>% 
    mutate(gene = make.unique(gene))

cluster_size_df <- 
    anno_df %>% group_by(cluster_label) %>% tally(name = "total")

cryptic_prop_cluster <- junc_cryptic_master %>%
    left_join(cluster_size_df) %>% 
    filter(!is.na(cluster)) %>%
    group_by(junction,cluster_label) %>% 
    reframe(n = n_distinct(barcode),gene,tdp43_sensitivity_sh,tdp43_sensitivity_be2) %>% 
    unique() %>% 
    left_join(cluster_size_df, by = "cluster_label") %>% 
    mutate(prop = n / total) 
## Joining with `by = join_by(cluster_label)`
fish_sh = quick_bind %>%
    mutate(overlap = paste_into_igv_junction %in% junc_cryptic_master$junction) %>% 
    select(tdp43_sensitivity_sh,overlap) %>% 
    filter(tdp43_sensitivity_sh %in% c("Early","Late")) %>% 
    table() 

ft = rstatix::fisher_test(fish_sh)

fish_sh %>% 
    melt() %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = overlap, values_from = value) %>%
    mutate( prop = `TRUE` / (`TRUE` + `FALSE`) ) %>%
    mutate(prop_label = paste0(`TRUE`, "/", `FALSE`) ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = tdp43_sensitivity_sh, y = prop)) + geom_col() +
    geom_text(aes(label = prop_label), nudge_y =  0.01) +
    labs(y = "Proportion detected",x = element_blank()) +
    geom_signif(
        comparisons = list(c("Early", "Late")),
        annotations = paste("p =", round(ft$p, digits = 3)),
        tip_length = 0.03
    ) +
    theme_classic()
## Warning: The melt generic in data.table has been passed a table and will
## attempt to redirect to the relevant reshape2 method; please note that reshape2
## is superseded and is no longer actively developed, and this redirection is now
## deprecated. To continue using melt methods from reshape2 while both libraries
## are attached, e.g. melt.list, you can prepend the namespace, i.e.
## reshape2::melt(.). In the next version, this warning will become an error.

fish_sk = quick_bind %>%
    mutate(overlap = paste_into_igv_junction %in% junc_cryptic_master$junction) %>% 
    select(tdp43_sensitivity_be2,overlap) %>% 
    filter(tdp43_sensitivity_be2 %in% c("Early","Late")) %>% 
    table() 

ft_sk = rstatix::fisher_test(fish_sk)

fish_sk %>% 
    melt() %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = overlap, values_from = value) %>%
    mutate( prop = `TRUE` / (`TRUE` + `FALSE`) ) %>%
    mutate(prop_label = paste0(`TRUE`, "/", `FALSE`) ) %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = tdp43_sensitivity_be2, y = prop)) + 
    geom_col() +
    geom_text(aes(label = prop_label), nudge_y =  0.01) +
    labs(y = "Proportion detected",x = element_blank()) +
    geom_signif(
        comparisons = list(c("Early", "Late")),
        annotations = paste("p =", round(ft_sk$p, digits = 3)),
        tip_length = 0.03
    ) +
    theme_classic()
